items.title: Apple, Microsoft, Meta To Report Results; Fed's Interest Rate Decision In Focus
items.description: Wall Street Week Ahead: key earnings (AAPL, MSFT, META, TSLA), Fed rate decision, IPOs, dividends and volatility picks. Read more details here.

items.title: Does Dividend Payout Amid Proposed APR Cap Change The Bull Case For American Express (AXP)?
items.description: Earlier this week, American Express’s board declared a quarterly dividend of US$8,875.00 per share on its 3.550% Fixed Rate Reset Noncumulative Preferred Shares, Series D, payable on March 15, 2026 to holders of record on March 1, 2026, while the White House advanced a proposal to cap credit card interest rates at a 10% APR. This combination of continued capital returns to preferred shareholders and heightened regulatory scrutiny of credit card pricing highlights the tension between...
